name: Chicken Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in boiling water.
2. Add flour; stir until smooth.
3. Cook and stir until the mixture forms a ball that doesn't separate.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Beat eggs until smooth, then add cheese.
7. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
8. Drop dough onto a greased baking sheet, using about 1 level teaspoon of dough for each puff.
9. Bake for 20 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool.
11. Split the puffs open.
12. Finely chop cooked chicken, pimiento, and olives.
13. Fill each puff with about 2 teaspoons of the filling.
